 {"id":"gt-jpt","title":"Town-level beads: Real DB for coordination mail","description":"Implement Option A from mail redesign: Town gets real beads DB for coordination.

## Background

Mail is now Beads. But currently:
- Town .beads/redirect points to rig beads
- mayor/mail/ has legacy JSONL files
- Cross-rig coordination has no clear home

## Design

Town beads = coordination, cross-rig mail, mayor inbox, handoffs
Rig beads = project issues, work items

Matches HOP hierarchy: platform > project > worker

## Structure

~/gt/
  .beads/           # REAL beads DB (prefix: gm-)
  mayor/
    town.json
    state.json      # NO mail/ directory
  gastown/
    .beads/         # Rig beads (prefix: ga-)

## Tasks

1. Delete ~/gt/.beads/redirect
2. Run bd init --prefix gm at ~/gt/ (town beads)
3. Delete ~/gt/mayor/mail/ directory
4. Update gt mail to use beads not JSONL
5. Add mail fields (thread_id, reply_to, msg_type)
6. Update gt prime for two-tier model
7. Update docs/architecture.md

## Addressing

- mayor/ -> town beads
- rig/agent -> rig beads
- Cross-rig -> town beads","status":"tombstone","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-17T19:09:55.855955-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-27T21:29:54.23675-08:00","deleted_at":"2025-12-27T21:29:54.23675-08:00","deleted_by":"daemon","delete_reason":"delete","original_type":"epic"}
 {"id":"gt-jq0f","title":"Merge: gt-yd98","description":"branch: polecat/valkyrie
target: main

+{"id":"gt-jq8i4","title":"Auto-create convoy when slinging single issue","description":"When gt sling is used without an existing convoy context, auto-create one for dashboard visibility.

CURRENT:
gt sling bd-xyz beads/amber
# Issue assigned, but not tracked in convoy dashboard

DESIRED:
gt sling bd-xyz beads/amber
# -> Created convoy 'Work: bd-xyz' (hq-cv-xxx)
# -> Tracking bd-xyz
# -> Assigned to beads/amber

This ensures ALL work appears in gt convoy list, even 'swarm of one'.

IMPLEMENTATION:
File: internal/cmd/sling.go
1. Check if issue is already tracked by a convoy
2. If not, create convoy with title 'Work: <issue-title>'
3. Add tracks relation
4. Proceed with normal sling

OPTIONAL FLAG:
--no-convoy to skip auto-convoy creation","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:37:27.039315-08:00","created_by":"gastown/crew/max","updated_at":"2025-12-30T19:37:27.039315-08:00"}

 {"id":"gt-nq1a","title":"Add 'gt account add' command","description":"Register new account: create config dir, spawn claude with CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR set, user completes /login, add entry to accounts.yaml.","status":"tombstone","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-23T03:24:19.444213-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-27T21:29:56.184087-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-nq1a","depends_on_id":"gt-58tu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-23T03:24:34.722487-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}],"deleted_at":"2025-12-27T21:29:56.184087-08:00","deleted_by":"daemon","delete_reason":"delete","original_type":"task"}
+{"id":"gt-nq3pr","title":"Implement gt convoy add command","description":"Add the 'add' subcommand to convoy for adding issues to existing convoys.

SYNTAX:
gt convoy add <convoy-id> <issue-id> [issue-id...]

BEHAVIOR:
1. Validate convoy exists
2. Add 'tracks' dependency for each issue
3. If convoy is closed, reopen it automatically
4. Print confirmation

IMPLEMENTATION:
File: internal/cmd/convoy.go
Add: convoyAddCmd as subcommand

Example:
gt convoy add hq-cv-abc gt-new-issue
# -> Added gt-new-issue to convoy hq-cv-abc

gt convoy add hq-cv-abc gt-followup  # convoy was closed
# -> Reopened convoy hq-cv-abc

 {"id":"gt-nqrh","title":"Auto-restart patrol agents after N loops","description":"All patrol roles should auto-restart to keep context usage low. Role-specific heuristics:

**Deacon**: 
- 20 patrol loops without major incident
- Immediate restart after ANY extraordinary action (lifecycle request, remediation, escalation)
- Rationale: Keep context short so there's headroom if something big comes up

**Witness**:
- Based on polecats processed (not loop count)
- Restart after processing N polecats (spawns, nudges, decommissions)
- Suggested N: 10-15 polecats

**Refinery**:
- Based on MRs processed (not loop count)  
- Restart after processing N merge requests
- Suggested N: 5-10 MRs (merges are context-heavy)

Benefits:
- Keeps context fresh (better focus/performance)
- Reduces cost (quadratic increase vs conversation length)
- Preserves headroom for handling surprises
- Simple and predictable (no context estimation needed)

Each role tracks their metric in state file and hands off when threshold reached.","status":"tombstone","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-23T14:00:00.093148-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-27T21:29:52.990581-08:00","deleted_at":"2025-12-27T21:29:52.990581-08:00","deleted_by":"daemon","delete_reason":"delete","original_type":"task"}
